tagline: Fixed access request availability: Resolved an issue where the option to request access was not available and a "Resource not found" error was incorrectly shown.
what_it_does: Fixed access request availability: Resolved an issue where the option to request access was not available and a "Resource not found" error was incorrectly shown. Full width pivot tables: Widgets now render pivot tables at full width for better readability. Tooltip fields on charts: Combo and dual axis charts now support tooltip fields.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Fixed access request availability: Resolved an issue where the option to request access was not available and a "Resource not found" error was incorrectly shown.
